task.objective: Add a local, read-only GitHub pull-request importer that uses an already-authenticated gh CLI to collect bounded PR metadata and produce the existing deterministic evidence packet without collecting bodies, patches, logs, file contents, or secrets.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
direct HTTP or GraphQL clients outside the local gh CLI
API key, token, credential, billing, credit, paid cloud, or paid SaaS setup
PR body, review body, patch body, command log, or target file-content collection
target repository checkout, code execution, or verification execution
API, MCP, web, GitHub App, SARIF, or model-provider delivery surfaces
canonical terminology, Verdict, Trust, Evidence authority, or product-semantic changes
product readiness, trusted release, or authoritative Proofrail product Verdict claims

requirements: Add GATE-GH-001 as the first branch commit.
Preserve buildEvidencePacket(input) and v0.1 CLI compatibility.
Use only an already-authenticated local gh CLI and fail readably when gh is missing, unauthenticated, or the PR cannot be read.
Collect only PR identity, refs, exact head SHA, changed-file summaries, commit identities, check conclusions, and review-state metadata.
Do not request or retain PR/review bodies, patches, logs, target file contents, tokens, or environment secrets.
Map facts into the existing packet input model without promoting PR text or Builder claims to Evidence.
Represent absent or unsuccessful checks and absent exact-head independent review as missing evidence or review needs.
Keep JSON canonical, deterministic, backward compatible, and terminated by one newline.
Validate repo and PR arguments before invoking gh and never interpolate through a shell.
Add sanitized fixtures and tests for mapping, reordered data, checks, review, scope, malformed output, gh failure, secret non-disclosure, stdout, and output files.
Add concise usage and security-boundary documentation.
Use no dependency or lockfile change; do not execute target code or claim readiness, trusted release, or a product Verdict.

requiredInvariants: The MTC is the first branch commit and every changed path is writable.
Runtime and fixtures exclude bodies, patches, logs, file contents, and secrets.
gh is invoked without a shell and only for read-only PR metadata.
Claims remain non-authoritative and missing evidence remains explicit.
No dependency, lockfile, target execution, GitHub write, authority, semantic, or readiness change is introduced.

stopConditions: External dependency or lockfile change required
Credentials, API keys, credits, billing, paid cloud, or paid SaaS required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Target checkout, content or patch collection, or target execution required: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Authority or product semantics must change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
Existing defect cannot be resolved within scope: BLOCKED_SCOPE
